article_meta.title: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY) called the SAVE America Act “one of the most despicable pieces of legislatio

reasoning: The summary largely maintains neutral language, attributing charged phrases to Schumer and avoiding Breitbart’s loaded framing (e.g., replaces “dragging his feet” with “after weeks of delay”). It includes one mildly assertive projection (“expected to fail”) without explicit attribution, but overall does not adopt the article’s emotive rhetoric as fact.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs like “criticized,” “accused,” and attributes quotes; avoids source’s “rant” and similar.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: States the bill is expected to fail without clear attribution in the summary/key facts.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Describes the bill as an election integrity/voter ID measure with distancing language; evaluative statements are attributed.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Includes charged terms only in quotes attributed to Schumer; tone remains measured.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No insults or character attacks in the model’s own voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about internal motives beyond quoting Schumer’s assertions.
custom_reasoning.slant: Focus mirrors the article’s emphasis on Schumer’s critique while noting GOP scheduling action.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: All major perspectives present in the article (Schumer, Thune scheduling, CNBC mention) are included.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Avoids subjective modifiers in its own voice.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Uses politically sensitive terms (election integrity) with “described as,” limiting endorsement of framing.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Reflects critical content proportionally to the source without amplifying it.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No systematic favoring of elites or grassroots; simply reports quoted officials.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Neutral paraphrasing with proper attribution; does not inherit Breitbart’s loaded labels.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures Schumer’s stance, procedural context from Thune/CNBC; no missing major viewpoint present in the article.
